custom-sql.sql: SELECT SocialActivity.activityId FROM SocialActivity INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = SocialActivity.userId) WHERE (SocialActivity.groupId = ?) AND (SocialActivity.mirrorActivityId = 0) AND (SocialActivity.classNameId IN ([$CLASS_NAME_IDS$])) AND (Users_Orgs.organizationId IN ([$ORGANIZATION_IDS$])) ORDER BY SocialActivity.createDate DESC

SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN UserGroupRole ON (UserGroupRole.userId = User_.userId) AND (UserGroupRole.roleId IN ([$ROLE_IDS$])) INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = User_.userId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Users_Orgs.organizationId) AND (Organization_.parentOrganizationId = ?) INNER JOIN OSB_CorpEntry ON (OSB_CorpEntry.organizationId = Organization_.organizationId) AND (OSB_CorpEntry.status = ?) INNER JOIN OSB_DeveloperEntry ON (OSB_DeveloperEntry.dossieraAccountKey = OSB_CorpEntry.dossieraAccountKey) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.type_ = ?) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.status = ?) WHERE (User_.userId NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN Users_Groups ON (Users_Groups.userId = User_.userId) AND (Users_Groups.groupId = ?) INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = Users_Groups.groupId) ) )

SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN Users_Groups ON (Users_Groups.userId = User_.userId) AND (Users_Groups.groupId = ?) INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = Users_Groups.groupId) WHERE (User_.userId NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN UserGroupRole ON (UserGroupRole.userId = User_.userId) AND (UserGroupRole.roleId IN ([$ROLE_IDS$])) INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = User_.userId) INNER JOIN Organization_ ON (Organization_.organizationId = Users_Orgs.organizationId) AND (Organization_.parentOrganizationId = ?) INNER JOIN OSB_CorpEntry ON (OSB_CorpEntry.organizationId = Organization_.organizationId) AND (OSB_CorpEntry.status = ?) INNER JOIN OSB_DeveloperEntry ON (OSB_DeveloperEntry.dossieraAccountKey = OSB_CorpEntry.dossieraAccountKey) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.type_ = ?) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.status = ?) ) ) AND (User_.userId NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN OSB_DeveloperEntry ON (OSB_DeveloperEntry.userId = User_.userId) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.type_ = ?) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.status = ?) ) )

SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN OSB_DeveloperEntry ON (OSB_DeveloperEntry.userId = User_.userId) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.type_ = ?) AND (OSB_DeveloperEntry.status = ?) WHERE (User_.userId NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT User_.userId FROM User_ INNER JOIN Users_Groups ON (Users_Groups.userId = User_.userId) AND (Users_Groups.groupId = ?) INNER JOIN Group_ ON (Group_.groupId = Users_Groups.groupId) ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_TicketEntry INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = OSB_SupportWorker.userId) AND (OSB_TicketWorker.primary_ = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.closedDate IS NULL) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.status != [$STATUS_INACTIVE$]) AND (OSB_TicketEntry.weight = [$WEIGHT$])
UPDATE OSB_SupportTeam SET OSB_SupportTeam.assignedWork = ( SELECT SUM(OSB_SupportWorker.assignedWork) FROM OSB_SupportWorker WHERE OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId )
UPDATE OSB_SupportTeam SET OSB_SupportTeam.maxWork = ( SELECT SUM(OSB_SupportWorker.maxWork) FROM OSB_SupportWorker WHERE OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = OSB_SupportTeam.supportTeamId )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId FROM OSB_AccountEntry LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerEntry ON OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId LEFT JOIN Address ON (Address.companyId = ?) AND (Address.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.ACCOUNTENTRY$]) AND (Address.classPK = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_AccountEntry.redirectAccountEntryId = 0) AND ( (OSB_AccountEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.industry = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.instructions) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.notes) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_PartnerEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.street1) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.countryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.regionId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.city) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.zip) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) )
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.industry = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AccountEntry.*} FROM OSB_AccountEntry INNER JOIN OSB_SecurityPatch ON (OSB_SecurityPatch.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_SecurityPatch.portletId = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AccountEntry.name

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId, OSB_AccountEntry.name AS accountEntryName, OSB_AccountEntry.code_ AS accountEntryCode FROM OSB_AccountEntry LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerEntry ON OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId LEFT JOIN Address ON (Address.companyId = ?) AND (Address.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.ACCOUNTENTRY$]) AND (Address.classPK = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_AccountEntry.redirectAccountEntryId = 0) AND ( (OSB_AccountEntry.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.industry = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.tier = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_AccountEntry.status = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.instructions) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.notes) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_PartnerEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.street1) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.countryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.regionId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.city) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.zip) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEnvironment ON (OSB_AccountEnvironment.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envAS = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envDB = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envJVM = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envLFR = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AccountEnvironment.envOS = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountWorker.role = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ = 4) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.licenses = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) )

WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ != 4) AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_OfferingEntry WHERE ( (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) ) ) [$ACTIVE_SUPPORT_COMPARATOR$] 0

WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.type_ != 4) AND ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_OfferingEntry WHERE ( (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportEndDate > ?) ) ) [$EXPIRED_SUPPORT_COMPARATOR$] 0

WHERE OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId NOT IN ( SELECT OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId FROM OSB_AccountEntry INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId )
INNER JOIN OSB_OfferingEntry ON (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.productEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntries_SupportRegions ON (OSB_AccountEntries_SupportRegions.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountEntries_SupportRegions.supportRegionId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportResponseId = ?)

WHERE ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM OSB_OfferingEntry WHERE (OSB_OfferingEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.supportTickets = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_OfferingEntry.status = ?) ) [$TICKET_SUPPORT_COMPARATOR$] 0
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AppEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(OSB_AppEntry.title) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AppFlag INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion ON OSB_AppFlag.appVersionId = OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.developerEntryId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AppEntry INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackage ON OSB_AppPackage.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId WHERE (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.prepackaged = ?) AND (OSB_AppEntry.status = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AppEntry.title ASC
WHERE (OSB_AppEntry.developerEntryId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AppEntry.developerEntryId != ?)
WHERE (OSB_AppEntry.portalRequired = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AppEntry.status = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppEntry.*} FROM OSB_AppEntry INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackage ON OSB_AppPackage.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId WHERE (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.prepackaged = ?) AND (OSB_AppEntry.status = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AppEntry.title ASC
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppEntry.*} FROM OSB_AppEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(OSB_AppEntry.title) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ORDER BY OSB_AppEntry.title ASC

INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackage ON OSB_AppPackage.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId WHERE ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) OR ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility >= ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility < ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibilityPlus = ?) ) )

INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion appVersion1 ON (appVersion1.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId) WHERE appVersion1.appVersionId = ( SELECT MAX(appVersion2.appVersionId) FROM OSB_AppVersion appVersion2 WHERE appVersion2.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId ) AND (appVersion1.status = ?)

INNER JOIN AssetEntry ON (AssetEntry.classPK = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId) INNER JOIN AssetEntries_AssetCategories ON (AssetEntries_AssetCategories.entryId = AssetEntry.entryId) WHERE (AssetEntry.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.APPENTRY$]) AND (AssetEntries_AssetCategories.categoryId = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion ON (OSB_AppVersion.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_AssetReceiptLicense ON (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.productClassPK = OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId) WHERE (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.productClassNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.APPVERSION$]) AND (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.ownerClassNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.PORTAL.MODEL.USER$]) AND (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.ownerClassPK = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppPackage.*} FROM OSB_AppPackage INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion ON OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId = OSB_AppPackage.appVersionId WHERE (OSB_AppPackage.appEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_AppVersion.status = ?) AND ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) OR ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility >= ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility < ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibilityPlus = ?) ) ) ORDER BY OSB_AppVersion.versionOrder DESC, OSB_AppPackage.compatibility DESC

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppPackage.*} FROM OSB_AppPackage INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackagePlugin ON OSB_AppPackagePlugin.appPackageId = OSB_AppPackage.appPackageId WHERE (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.prepackaged = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackagePlugin.bundleSymbolicName = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackagePlugin.bundleVersion = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppPackage.*} FROM OSB_AppPackage INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackagePlugin ON OSB_AppPackagePlugin.appPackageId = OSB_AppPackage.appPackageId WHERE (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.prepackaged = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackagePlugin.contextName = ?) AND (OSB_AppPackagePlugin.relengHash = ?)

SELECT {OSB_AppPricingItem.*} FROM OSB_AppPricingItem INNER JOIN OSB_AppPricing ON OSB_AppPricing.appPricingId = OSB_AppPricingItem.appPricingId WHERE (OSB_AppPricing.appVersionId = ?) AND (OSB_AppPricingItem.assetLicenseId = ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AppVersion WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.appEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_AppVersion.status = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppVersion.*} FROM OSB_AppVersion INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackage ON OSB_AppPackage.appVersionId = OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.appEntryId = ?) AND ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) OR ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility >= ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility < ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibilityPlus = ?) ) ) AND (OSB_AppVersion.status = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AppVersion.versionOrder DESC
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AppVersion.*} FROM OSB_AppVersion WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.appEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_AppVersion.status = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AppVersion.versionOrder DESC

SELECT {OSB_AssetAudit.*} FROM OSB_AssetAudit WHERE (OSB_AssetAudit.userId = ?) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.type_ = ?) GROUP BY OSB_AssetAudit.classNameId, OSB_AssetAudit.classPK ORDER BY MAX(OSB_AssetAudit.createDate) DESC

SELECT OSB_AssetAudit.legalEntityName, count(OSB_AssetAudit.legalEntityName) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AssetAudit WHERE (OSB_AssetAudit.createDate > ?) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.createDate < ?) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.vendorClassNameId = ?) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.vendorClassPK = ?) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.type_ = ?) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.legalEntityName IS NOT NULL) AND (OSB_AssetAudit.legalEntityName != '') GROUP BY OSB_AssetAudit.legalEntityName ORDER BY COUNT_VALUE DESC

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AssetList.*} FROM OSB_AssetList INNER JOIN OSB_AssetListAssetEntry ON OSB_AssetListAssetEntry.assetListId = OSB_AssetList.assetListId WHERE (OSB_AssetListAssetEntry.assetEntryId = ?)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OSB_AssetReceipt.assetReceiptId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AssetReceipt [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_AssetReceipt.productClassNameId = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
WHERE (OSB_AssetReceipt.assetEntryId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AssetReceipt.createDate > ?)
WHERE (OSB_AssetReceipt.createDate < ?)
WHERE (OSB_AssetReceipt.ownerClassNameId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_AssetReceipt.ownerClassPK = ?)
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_AssetReceipt.*} FROM OSB_AssetReceipt [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_AssetReceipt.productClassNameId = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
INNER JOIN AssetEntry assetEntry1 ON (assetEntry1.entryId = OSB_AssetReceipt.assetEntryId) WHERE (lower(assetEntry1.title) LIKE ?)

INNER JOIN AssetEntry assetEntry2 ON (assetEntry2.entryId = OSB_AssetReceipt.assetEntryId) INNER JOIN AssetEntries_AssetCategories ON (AssetEntries_AssetCategories.entryId = assetEntry2.entryId) WHERE (AssetEntries_AssetCategories.categoryId = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_AppEntry ON (OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId = OSB_AssetReceipt.productClassPK) INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion ON (OSB_AppVersion.appEntryId = OSB_AppEntry.appEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_AppPackage ON (OSB_AppPackage.appVersionId = OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId) WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.status = 0) AND ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility = ?) OR ( (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility >= ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibility < ?) AND (OSB_AppPackage.compatibilityPlus = true) ) )

INNER JOIN OSB_AssetReceiptLicense ON OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.assetReceiptId = OSB_AssetReceipt.assetReceiptId WHERE (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.licenseType = ?) AND (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.endDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) AND (OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.endDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_AssetReceiptLicense INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion ON OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId = OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.productClassPK WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.ownerClassNameId = ?) AND (OSB_AppVersion.ownerClassPK = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.createDate

SELECT {OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.*} FROM OSB_AssetReceiptLicense INNER JOIN OSB_AppVersion ON OSB_AppVersion.appVersionId = OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.productClassPK WHERE (OSB_AppVersion.ownerClassNameId = ?) AND (OSB_AppVersion.ownerClassPK = ?) ORDER BY OSB_AssetReceiptLicense.createDate
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_CorpEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(OSB_CorpEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
WHERE (OSB_CorpEntry.status = ?)
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_CorpEntry.*} FROM OSB_CorpEntry [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(OSB_CorpEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ORDER BY OSB_CorpEntry.name ASC
INNER JOIN Address ON (Address.addressId = OSB_CorpEntry.addressId) WHERE (Address.countryId = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_HolidayEntry.*} FROM OSB_HolidayEntry INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendar ON (OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayEntry.holidayCalendarId) INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendarRel ON (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId) WHERE (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.userId = ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.repeatYearly = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_HolidayEntry.*} FROM OSB_HolidayEntry INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendar ON (OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayEntry.holidayCalendarId) INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendarRel ON (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.holidayCalendarId = OSB_HolidayCalendar.holidayCalendarId) WHERE (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.userId = ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.repeatYearly = ?) AND ( ( (OSB_HolidayEntry.startDate >= ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.startDate <= ?) ) OR ( (OSB_HolidayEntry.endDate >= ?) AND (OSB_HolidayEntry.endDate <= ?) ) )

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_LicenseKey INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountEntry.corpProjectId = ?) AND (OSB_LicenseKey.key_ = ?) AND (OSB_LicenseKey.active_ = ?)

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeyId FROM OSB_LicenseKey LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId LEFT JOIN OSB_LicenseKeySet ON OSB_LicenseKeySet.licenseKeySetId = OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeySetId [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] ( (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKeySet.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.licenseEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.productEntryName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.productId) = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.productVersion = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.owner) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.description) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.hostName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.ipAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.macAddresses) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.serverId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_LicenseKey.key_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeyId, OSB_LicenseKey.startDate, OSB_LicenseKey.expirationDate FROM OSB_LicenseKey LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON OSB_AccountEntry.accountEntryId = OSB_LicenseKey.accountEntryId LEFT JOIN OSB_LicenseKeySet ON OSB_LicenseKeySet.licenseKeySetId = OSB_LicenseKey.licenseKeySetId [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = ?) [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) OR (lower(OSB_AccountEntry.code_) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.createDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.modifiedDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.modifiedDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.subject = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.satisfied = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_TicketFeedback.comments) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TicketFeedback.status = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$RATINGS$] )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.accountEntryId) WHERE (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = ?)

INNER JOIN Subscription ON (Subscription.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.TICKETENTRY$]) AND (Subscription.classPK = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketEntry.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE ( (Subscription.userId = ?) AND (OSB_TicketWorker.primary_ = [$TRUE$]) )

INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = OSB_TicketWorker.userId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = OSB_TicketFeedback.ticketEntryId) WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = ?)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TrainingCustomer INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId) WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])

SELECT DISTINCT OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId AS userId FROM OSB_TrainingCustomer INNER JOIN User_ ON (User_.userId = OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId) WHERE [$WHERE$] (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$])
WHERE ( (User_.emailAddress NOT LIKE ?) AND (lower(User_.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TrainingEvent WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.DDLRecordSetId IS NOT NULL) AND (OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate > ?) AND (OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate < ?)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TrainingEvent INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingCustomer ON (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.TRAININGEVENT$]) AND (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classPK = OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingEventId) WHERE (OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId = ?)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TrainingEvent WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingCourseId IN ([$TRAINING_COURSE_IDS$])) AND (OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate > ?)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingEventId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TrainingEvent INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingCourse ON (OSB_TrainingCourse.trainingCourseId = OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingCourseId) LEFT JOIN Address ON (OSB_TrainingEvent.addressId = Address.addressId) LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerEntry ON (OSB_TrainingEvent.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId) LEFT JOIN OSB_TrainingWorker ON (OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingEventId = OSB_TrainingWorker.classPK) LEFT JOIN User_ ON (OSB_TrainingWorker.userId = User_.userId) [$JOIN$] WHERE [$WHERE$] ( (OSB_TrainingEvent.type_ = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_TrainingEvent.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_TrainingCourse.name) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingEvent.portalMinorVersion = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(Address.city) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.regionId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (Address.countryId = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_TrainingEvent.languageId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingEvent.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingEvent.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
WHERE (Address.countryId IN ([$COUNTRY_IDS$]))
WHERE (lower(Address.street1 [$OPERATOR$] 'online'))
WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.portalMinorVersion = ?)
WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.startDate > ?)
WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingCourseId IN ([$TRAINING_COURSE_IDS$]))
WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.type_ = ?)
SELECT {OSB_TrainingEvent.*} FROM OSB_TrainingEvent WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.DDLRecordSetId IS NOT NULL) AND (OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate > ?) AND (OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate < ?)

SELECT {OSB_TrainingEvent.*} FROM OSB_TrainingEvent INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingCustomer ON (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.TRAININGEVENT$]) AND (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classPK = OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingEventId) WHERE (OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId = ?)
SELECT {OSB_TrainingEvent.*} FROM OSB_TrainingEvent LEFT JOIN Address ON (OSB_TrainingEvent.addressId = Address.addressId) WHERE [$WHERE$] ORDER BY OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate ASC
SELECT {OSB_TrainingEvent.*} FROM OSB_TrainingEvent WHERE (OSB_TrainingEvent.trainingCourseId IN ([$TRAINING_COURSE_IDS$])) AND (OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate > ?) ORDER BY OSB_TrainingEvent.endDate ASC

[$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_PartnerEntry.partnerEntryId = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingEvent.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingEvent.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.firstName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(User_.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )
LEFT JOIN DDLRecordSet ON (OSB_TrainingEvent.DDLRecordSetId = DDLRecordSet.recordSetId) WHERE (DDLRecordSet.scope = ?)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT OSB_TrainingExamResult.trainingExamResultId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM OSB_TrainingExamResult INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingCustomer ON (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.TRAININGEXAMRESULT$]) AND (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classPK = OSB_TrainingExamResult.trainingExamResultId) INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingExam ON (OSB_TrainingExam.trainingExamId = OSB_TrainingExamResult.trainingExamId) INNER JOIN OSB_ExternalIdMapper ON (OSB_ExternalIdMapper.classNameId = [$CLASS_NAME_ID_COM.LIFERAY.OSB.MODEL.TRAININGEXAM$]) AND (OSB_ExternalIdMapper.classPK = OSB_TrainingExam.trainingExamId) WHERE ( (OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId = ?) AND ( (lower(OSB_ExternalIdMapper.externalId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingExamResult.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingExamResult.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) )

[$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_UserProfileHistory.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_UserProfileHistory.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_ExternalIdMapper.externalId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

AND ( (lower(OSB_ExternalIdMapper.externalId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingExamResult.startDate > ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (OSB_TrainingExamResult.startDate < ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) )

[$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_UserProfileHistory.lastName) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_UserProfileHistory.emailAddress) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (lower(OSB_ExternalIdMapper.externalId) LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) GROUP BY OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId ORDER BY User_.lastName ASC, User_.firstName ASC, OSB_TrainingExamResult.startDate DESC
WHERE (OSB_TrainingExamResultSection.sectionKey NOT IN ([$TRAINING_EXAM_RESULT_SECTION_KEY$]))

SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_TrainingExamResultItem.*} FROM OSB_TrainingExamResultItem INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingExamResultSection ON (OSB_TrainingExamResultSection.trainingExamResultSectionId = OSB_TrainingExamResultItem.trainingExamResultSectionId) WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_TrainingExamResultSection.trainingExamResultId = ?)
WHERE (OSB_TrainingExamResultSection.sectionKey NOT IN ([$TRAINING_EXAM_RESULT_SECTION_KEY$]))
SELECT DISTINCT {OSB_TrainingExamResultSection.*} FROM OSB_TrainingExamResultSection WHERE [$WHERE$] (OSB_TrainingExamResultSection.trainingExamResultId = ?)

SELECT {OSB_TrainingLocation.*} FROM OSB_TrainingLocation INNER JOIN Address ON Address.addressId = OSB_TrainingLocation.addressId LEFT JOIN Country ON Country.countryId = Address.countryId LEFT JOIN Region ON Region.regionId = Address.regionId
WHERE ( (User_.status = ?) OR (User_.status = ?) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = User_.userId) WHERE ( (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountCustomer.role = ?) )

LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountCustomer ON (OSB_AccountCustomer.userId = User_.userId) LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE ( ( (OSB_AccountCustomer.accountEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_AccountCustomer.role = ?) ) OR ( (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?) AND (OSB_PartnerWorker.role = ?) ) )
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_AccountWorker.role = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker AS OSB_PartnerWorker1 ON (OSB_PartnerWorker1.userId = User_.userId) INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) AND (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerWorker1.partnerEntryId) INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker AS OSB_PartnerWorker2 ON (OSB_PartnerWorker2.partnerEntryId = OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker2.userId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.modifiedUserId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_AccountWorker ON (OSB_AccountWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_AccountWorker.accountEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = User_.userId) INNER JOIN OSB_CorpEntry ON (OSB_CorpEntry.organizationId = Users_Orgs.organizationId) WHERE (OSB_CorpEntry.corpEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = User_.userId) INNER JOIN OSB_CorpProject ON (OSB_CorpProject.organizationId = Users_Orgs.organizationId) WHERE (OSB_CorpProject.corpProjectId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_LicenseKey ON (OSB_LicenseKey.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_LicenseKey ON (OSB_LicenseKey.modifiedUserId = User_.userId)

LEFT JOIN Users_Orgs ON (Users_Orgs.userId = User_.userId) LEFT JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = User_.userId) LEFT JOIN OSB_AccountEntry ON (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerEntryId = OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId) WHERE ( (Users_Orgs.organizationId = ?) OR (OSB_AccountEntry.partnerManagedSupport = [$TRUE$]) )
INNER JOIN OSB_HolidayCalendarRel ON (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_HolidayCalendarRel.holidayCalendarId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_OrderEntry ON (OSB_OrderEntry.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_OrderEntry ON (OSB_OrderEntry.modifiedUserId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_PartnerWorker ON (OSB_PartnerWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_PartnerWorker.partnerEntryId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_SupportWorker ON (OSB_SupportWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_SupportWorker.supportTeamId = ?)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = User_.userId)
INNER JOIN OSB_TicketWorker ON (OSB_TicketWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_TicketWorker.ticketEntryId = ?)

INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingCustomer ON (OSB_TrainingCustomer.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classNameId = ?) AND (OSB_TrainingCustomer.classPK = ?) AND ( (User_.status = ?) OR (User_.status = ?) )
INNER JOIN OSB_TrainingWorker ON (OSB_TrainingWorker.userId = User_.userId) WHERE (OSB_TrainingWorker.classNameId = ?) AND (OSB_TrainingWorker.classPK = ?)
